name: cat
readme:
Short:        Concatenate and print files
Type:         util/cli
Architecture: m68k-amigaos >= 3.0
Uploader:     duncan (at) bowring (dot) us
Author:       University of California, Berkeley (ported by Duncan Bowring)
Version:      1.34

cat - Concatenate and print files

Original author: University of California, Berkeley
Ported by Duncan Bowring using amiport (AI-assisted porting toolkit).
Project: https://github.com/bdgscotland/amiport

Cross-compiled for AmigaOS 3.x (68000+).
Tested in vamos emulator and FS-UAE.

Usage:
  cat [options] [arguments]

Includes full source code (original POSIX and ported Amiga versions)
porting_notes: Port from OpenBSD. Applied standard amiport transformations: exit codes mapped to AmigaOS conventions (0/10/20), __stack cookie set to 8192, argv wildcard expansion via amiport_expand_argv(). Supports -n (number all lines), -b (number non-blank lines), -e (show $ at EOL), -t (show tabs as ^I), -s (squeeze blank lines), -v (show non-printing). 30/30 FS-UAE tests pass.
